title: Raccoon Removal Upper East Side | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Upper East Side, Manhattan. Licensed experts serving townhouses, pre-war buildings & luxury residences. Call for fast removal: $900-$4,000.
intro: Raccoons in the Upper East Side are increasingly finding their way into townhouse attics, co-op buildings, and residential properties between Central Park and the East River. Our expert raccoon removal team provides humane, effective solutions tailored to Upper East Side's unique mix of historic brownstones and luxury high-rises. We understand the urgency of protecting your Manhattan property from raccoon damage and health hazards.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Upper East Side residents for years with discreet, professional raccoon removal that respects the neighborhood's high standards. Our licensed technicians are familiar with UES building codes, co-op board requirements, and provide same-day emergency service throughout the 10021, 10028, 10065, 10075, and 10128 zip codes.
localContext: The Upper East Side's proximity to Central Park and tree-lined streets creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity, particularly around Museum Mile and residential blocks near Fifth Avenue and Park Avenue. Pre-war buildings with accessible rooflines and townhouses with chimney access points are especially vulnerable to raccoon intrusions, requiring specialized removal techniques that preserve architectural integrity.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in the Upper East Side typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and extent of damage. Multi-unit buildings or complex access situations may be at the higher end, while single raccoon removals from accessible areas cost less. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: The Upper East Side's abundance of trees, proximity to Central Park, and older buildings with accessible entry points make it attractive to raccoons. They seek attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in townhouses and pre-war buildings for nesting, especially during spring birthing season. Garbage from restaurants along Madison Avenue and residential areas also provides food sources.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Upper East Side property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout the Upper East Side and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process takes 3-7 days on average, depending on whether babies are present and the complexity of the situation. We work efficiently while ensuring humane treatment and compliance with NYC wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: Do you handle raccoon damage repair in Upper East Side buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive raccoon damage restoration including insulation replacement, entry point sealing, chimney cap installation, and sanitization of affected areas. We work with Upper East Side co-op boards and property managers to ensure repairs meet building standards and prevent future intrusions. All repairs come with warranties and are performed by licensed contractors familiar with Manhattan building codes.
